hooks.command: repo=$PWD; until [ -f "$repo/justfile" ] && [ -f "$repo/xtask/Cargo.toml" ]; do [ "$repo" != / ] || { printf 'error: cannot find Kithara repository root\n' >&2; exit 1; }; repo=${repo%/*}; [ -n "$repo" ] || repo=/; done; warn_launcher() { printf 'warning: agent hook launcher is unavailable; install just and retry\n' >&2; exit 0; }; command -v just >/dev/null 2>&1 || warn_launcher; if just --quiet --justfile "$repo/justfile" --working-directory "$repo" _agent-hook pre-bash; then exit 0; else status=$?; fi; case "$status" in 126|127) warn_launcher ;; *) exit "$status" ;; esac
